zh.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England: 英國爾麗頓 白 內斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Bickerton於大約1362年出生在英國爾比可頓時，她的父親Hugh Bickerton43歲，母親Mrs Hugh de Bickerton36歲。她和David De Malpas至少有2個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1394年在英國英格蘭享年33歲。

zh-hans.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England: 英国爾麗頓 白 內斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Bickerton于大约1362年出生在英国爾比可頓时，她的父亲Hugh Bickerton43岁，母亲Mrs Hugh de Bickerton36岁。她和David De Malpas至少有2个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1394年在英国英格兰享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bickerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places (for example in Cheshire, Herefordshire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire) named Bickerton, from Old English bīcere ‘beekeeper’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Bickerton was born about 1362, in Bickerton, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh Bickerton, was 43 and her mother, Mrs Hugh de Bickerton, was 36. She had at least 2 sons and 6 daughters with David De Malpas. She died in 1394, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Bickerton est née environ 1362, à Bickerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Bickerton, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mrs Hugh de Bickerton, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles avec David De Malpas. Elle est décédée en 1394, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Bickerton um 1362 in Bickerton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Bickerton 43 und ihre Mutter Mrs Hugh de Bickerton 36. Sie hatte mit David De Malpas mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1394 im Alter von 33 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Bickerton è nata il circa 1362 nel Bickerton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh Bickerton, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Mrs Hugh de Bickerton, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie con David De Malpas. Morì nel 1394, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Bickertonが約1362年にイギリスチェシュアイアビッカートンで生まれた時，父Hugh Bickertonは43歳，母Mrs Hugh de Bickertonは36歳であった。彼女はDavid De Malpasとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1394年にイギリスイギリスで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Bickerton(이)가 대략 1362년 영국 체실르 바이커턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Bickerton(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Hugh de Bickerton(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 David De Malpas(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1394년 영국 잉글랜드에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.of Hampton,Cheshire,England: Hampton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Bickerton nasceu aproximadamente 1362, em Bickerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Bickerton, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Hugh de Bickerton, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas com David De Malpas. Ela faleceu em 1394, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Bickerton родилась около 1362 г. в местности биккиртон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Bickerton было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Hugh de Bickerton, 36. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей от David De Malpas. Она умерла в 1394 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Bickerton nació aproximadamente 1362, en Bickerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Bickerton, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Mrs Hugh de Bickerton, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas con David De Malpas. Murió en 1394, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
